theme: the believable-demo-narrative release — turn the placeholder seeder (structurally-correct but hollow: 'User N', binary 85/35 scores, zero verified skills, G14 invalid-enum dead-row sessions) into a declarative Stories & Heroes engine. Each story is one org with a thriving/struggling/manager hero trio, seeded via the real verified-skill 7-table chain (jobsim -> user_skills -> user_skill_evidences) so the individual skill profile (Must #1) + the org Workforce dashboard (Must #2) tell one coherent story (the claimed-vs-verified gap is the 'aha'), plus a standalone presenter cockpit (login-as a hero + jump-to the right screen). 5 section milestones M34->M38 across rosetta-extensions (stack-seeding M34-M36 / clerkenstein M37 / demo-stack M38) + the rosetta corpus doc-half. Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits.

headline: Tooling + docs only — ZERO platform-repo edits throughout (verified: the rosetta release diff is confined to corpus/ + knowledge/plan/ + CLAUDE.md + .claude/skills/, no .go/.py/.sh/stack-* files). All 5 Clerkenstein alignment gates 100%/100%. Supply-chain GREEN (stdlib-only Go + Python, 0 new third-party deps). Significant test growth (stack-seeding 259->444; rext total 1027->1248 Go; +clerk-multi-1, the 5th multi-identity alignment surface; demo-stack/stack-injection grew). The release turns the placeholder seeder into a declarative Stories & Heroes demo engine + a presenter cockpit, proven live on demo-3.
notes: 5-milestone release. The CODE-of-record lives in the rosetta-extensions authoring copy (a SEPARATE git repo) at tags storytelling-m34..m38 — close-release merged ONLY the rosetta release/01.90-storytelling doc-half branch into main + tagged v1.9. Pushing the ext tags + main + the v1.9 tag to origin is the orchestrator's separate post-close step (LOCAL-only here). Carry-forward (user-authorized, still open from v1.8 close): the live field-bake on a freshly-emptied stack-demo/; the literal browser-pixels DEMO_STORIES=1 cockpit end-to-end (a deliberate demo step); pushing the ext tags to origin.
